items.title: Inside Elevate IP - How Canadian startups can access funding, and IP expertise
items.author: Lisa Desjardins (CIPO), Laura Cooke (ISED), Louis-Félix Binette (MAIN), Lola Arnaud (MAIN)
items.content:
How does ElevateIP help deliver IP support to businesses? 

Laura Cooke (ISED), Louis-Félix Binette, and Lola Arnaud (MAIN) answer this important question and more. Hear about how to access funding and how support is structured to promote long-term growth for your company.

Note: This episode was recorded in 2023 and since then ElevateIP has been awarded new funding to continue delivering on their mission to help businesses build their IP strategies.

items.title: Navigating the global ocean of IP—A Black entrepreneur’s perspective on protection and opportunity
items.author: CIPO, Ken Poulin
items.content: Ken Poulin is an independent trademark agent based in Vancouver. He explains why IP protection should start before and not after market success. As a Black entrepreneur himself, he shares his insights on what it looks like to support underrepresented communities, the role of diversity in Canada's innovation landscape and why educating business owners about the value of IP requires patience, empathy and a personal approach.
